title: Setting up a bullet journal — index, key, and future log
sources: SYNTHESISED — modern bullet-journal practice as documented across open-access sources; the Ryder Carroll format is widely described and has no PD canonical text
notes: Covers the physical craft of setting up the first pages: numbering all pages, the hand-lettered index, the key legend (migration marks, tasks, events, notes), the future log spread. Scope stays on the craft — the physical page-making, the spread design, the hand-lettered headers. No guidance on what to write in the future log itself. The signifier key is designed and lettered; the habit it encodes is out of scope.
